the report:\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# Alpamayo Codebase Report\\\\n\\\\n## 1. Overall Project Structure\\\\n\\\\n### Directories and Key Files\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n/data/Zhengyang/alpamayo/\\\\n├── notebooks/\\\\n│   ├── inference.ipynb           # Example inference notebook\\\\n│   └── explore_scenes.ipynb      # Scene exploration notebook\\\\n├── src/\\\\n│   └── alpamayo_r1/\\\\n│       ├── __init__.py           # Package marker\\\\n│       ├── config.py              # AlpamayoR1Config\\\\n│       ├── helper.py              # Message creation, processor, device utils\\\\n│       ├── load_physical_aiavdataset.py  # Dataset loader\\\\n│       ├── test_inference.py     # CLI inference script\\\\n│       ├── action_space/\\\\n│       │   ├── __init__.py\\\\n│       │   ├── action_space.py   # Base ActionSpace ABC\\\\n│       │   ├── unicycle_accel_curvature.py  # Unicycle action space (64 waypoints, accel+curvature)\\\\n│       │   ├── discrete_action_space.py    # Discrete trajectory tokenizer wrapper\\\\n│       │   └── utils.py          # Trajectory utilities\\\\n│       ├── diffusion/\\\\n│       │   ├── __init__.py\\\\n│       │   ├── base.py           # BaseDiffusion ABC\\\\n│       │   └── flow_matching.py  # FlowMatching diffusion (Euler integration)\\\\n│       ├── geometry/\\\\n│       │   └── rotation.py       # SO3/yaw/rotation helpers\\\\n│       └── models/\\\\n│           ├── alpamayo_r1.py    # Main AlpamayoR1 model\\\\n│           ├── base_model.py     # ReasoningVLA, ReasoningVLAConfig\\\\n│           ├── action_in_proj.py # PerWaypointActionInProjV2, Fourier encoders\\\\n│           ├── delta_tokenizer.py # DeltaTrajectoryTokenizer (history)\\\\n│           └── token_utils.py    # Token extraction, stopping, padding\\\\n├── pyproject.toml                # Dependencies (uv)\\\\n├── uv.lock                        # Locked dependency versions\\\\n├── README.md                      # Setup and usage\\\\n└── .cursor/rules/skyrule.mdc      # Coding conventions\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. Model Architecture\\\\n\\\\n### Architecture Summary\\\\n\\\\n- **Model type**: Vision–Language–Action (VLA)\\\\n- **Backbone**: Qwen3-VL (Cosmos-Reason) via &#96;Qwen3VLForConditionalGeneration&#96;\\\\n- **Flow**: VLM (Chain-of-Causation) → diffusion-based action expert → trajectory\\\\n\\\\n### Components\\\\n\\\\n| Component | File | Purpose |\\\\n|-----------|------|---------|\\\\n| **VLM backbone** | &#96;base_model.py&#96; | Qwen3-VL-8B with trajectory token embeddings, produces CoC reasoning |\\\\n| **Action expert** | &#96;alpamayo_r1.py&#96; | Transformer expert (no embed_tokens), non-causal attention |\\\\n| **Action input projection** | &#96;action_in_proj.py&#96; | &#96;PerWaypointActionInProjV2&#96; – Fourier + MLP per waypoint |\\\\n| **Action output projection** | Config uses &#96;torch.nn.Linear&#96; | Maps expert hidden states to action dims |\\\\n| **Diffusion** | &#96;flow_matching.py&#96; | Flow-matching with Euler integration (5 steps) |\\\\n| **Action space** | &#96;unicycle_accel_curvature.py&#96; | Unicycle with acceleration + curvature control |\\\\n\\\\n### Inference Flow (&#96;sample_trajectories_from_data_with_vlm_rollout&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n1. **History fusion**: Fuse history trajectory into input token IDs via &#96;fuse_traj_tokens&#96;.\\\\n2. **VLM generation**: VLM generates CoC reasoning up to &#96;&lt;|traj_future_start|&gt;&#96; with autoregressive sampling.\\\\n3. **Diffusion sampling**: Flow-matching in action space &#96;(64, 2)&#96; – 64 waypoints × (accel, curvature).\\\\n4. **Action→trajectory**: &#96;action_space.action_to_traj()&#96; converts actions to &#96;pred_xyz&#96;, &#96;pred_rot&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. Dataset and Data Loading\\\\n\\\\n### Data Source\\\\n\\\\n- **Dataset**: &#96;physical_ai_av.PhysicalAIAVDatasetInterface&#96;  \\\\n  → HuggingFace: &#96;nvidia/PhysicalAI-Autonomous-Vehicles&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Main Loader\\\\n\\\\n&#96;/data/Zhengyang/alpamayo/src/alpamayo_r1/load_physical_aiavdataset.py&#96;:\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\\\\ndef load_physical_aiavdataset(\\\\n    clip_id: str,\\\\n    t0_us: int = 5_100_000,\\\\n    avdi: PhysicalAIAVDatasetInterface | None = None,\\\\n    maybe_stream: bool = True,\\\\n    num_history_steps: int = 16,   # 1.6s at 10 Hz\\\\n    num_future_steps: int = 64,    # 6.4s at 10 Hz\\\\n    time_step: float = 0.1,       # 10 Hz\\\\n    camera_features: list | None = None,\\\\n    num_frames: int = 4,\\\\n) -&gt; dict[str, Any]\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Input Format (from loader)\\\\n\\\\n| Key | Shape | Description |\\\\n|-----|-------|-------------|\\\\n| &#96;image_frames&#96; | (N_cameras, num_frames, 3, H, W) | Multi-camera video frames |\\\\n| &#96;camera_indices&#96; | (N_cameras,) | Camera IDs (sorted) |\\\\n| &#96;ego_history_xyz&#96; | (1, 1, 16, 3) | History positions in local frame |\\\\n| &#96;ego_history_rot&#96; | (1, 1, 16, 3, 3) | History rotations in local frame |\\\\n| &#96;ego_future_xyz&#96; | (1, 1, 64, 3) | Ground-truth future (for evaluation) |\\\\n| &#96;ego_future_rot&#96; | (1, 1, 64, 3, 3) | Ground-truth future rotations |\\\\n| &#96;relative_timestamps&#96; | (N_cameras, num_frames) | Relative timestamps (seconds) |\\\\n| &#96;absolute_timestamps&#96; | (N_cameras, num_frames) | Absolute timestamps |\\\\n\\\\n### Cameras (default)\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;CAMERA_CROSS_LEFT_120FOV&#96;\\\\n- &#96;CAMERA_FRONT_WIDE_120FOV&#96;\\\\n- &#96;CAMERA_CROSS_RIGHT_120FOV&#96;\\\\n- &#96;CAMERA_FRONT_TELE_30FOV&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Data→Model Pipeline\\\\n\\\\n1. &#96;load_physical_aiavdataset()&#96; returns raw dict.\\\\n2. &#96;helper.create_message(data[\\\\\\\"image_frames\\\\\\\"].flatten(0, 1))&#96; builds chat messages.\\\\n3. &#96;processor.apply_chat_template()&#96; tokenizes and packs images.\\\\n4. History tokens are fused into &#96;input_ids&#96; via &#96;fuse_traj_tokens&#96;.\\\\n5. No standard PyTorch &#96;DataLoader&#96;/&#96;Dataset&#96;; single-sample loading for inference.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. Model Outputs\\\\n\\\\n### Primary outputs\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;pred_xyz&#96;**: (B, num_traj_sets, num_traj_samples, 64, 3) – future positions in local frame\\\\n- **&#96;pred_rot&#96;**: (B, num_traj_sets, num_traj_samples, 64, 3, 3) – future rotations in local frame\\\\n\\\\n### With &#96;return_extra=True&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;cot&#96;**: Chain-of-Causation reasoning (string) per trajectory\\\\n- **&#96;meta_action&#96;**: Meta-action text (if present)\\\\n- **&#96;answer&#96;**: Answer text\\\\n- **&#96;timing_cot_ms&#96;**, **&#96;timing_vision_ms&#96;**, **&#96;timing_traj_gen_ms&#96;**: Timing in ms\\\\n\\\\n### Trajectory details\\\\n\\\\n- 64 waypoints at 0.1 s intervals (6.4 s horizon)\\\\n- In ego frame at t0\\\\n- Diffused in (accel, curvature) space, then converted to xyz/rotation by &#96;UnicycleAccelCurvatureActionSpace&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. Configuration Files\\\\n\\\\n### HuggingFace config\\\\n\\\\nConfig comes from the pretrained model: &#96;nvidia/Alpamayo-R1-10B&#96; → &#96;config.json&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n### Main parameters (config.json)\\\\n\\\\n| Parameter | Value |\\\\n|-----------|-------|\\\\n| &#96;model_type&#96; | &#96;\\\\\\\"alpamayo_r1\\\\\\\"&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;vlm_backend&#96; | &#96;\\\\\\\"qwenvl3\\\\\\\"&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;model_dtype&#96; | &#96;\\\\\\\"bfloat16\\\\\\\"&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;attn_implementation&#96; | &#96;\\\\\\\"flash_attention_2\\\\\\\"&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;tokens_per_history_traj&#96; | 48 |\\\\n| &#96;tokens_per_future_traj&#96; | 128 |\\\\n| &#96;traj_vocab_size&#96; | 4000 |\\\\n| &#96;min_pixels&#96; | 163840 |\\\\n| &#96;max_pixels&#96; | 196608 |\\\\n| &#96;add_special_tokens&#96; | true |\\\\n\\\\n### Action space (from config)\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;n_waypoints&#96;: 64\\\\n- &#96;dt&#96;: 0.1\\\\n- &#96;accel_bounds&#96;: [-9.8, 9.8]\\\\n- &#96;curvature_bounds&#96;: [-0.33, 0.33]\\\\n- Normalization: &#96;accel_mean&#96;, &#96;accel_std&#96;, &#96;curvature_mean&#96;, &#96;curvature_std&#96; (fixed values)\\\\n\\\\n### Diffusion\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;int_method&#96;: &#96;\\\\\\\"euler\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n- &#96;num_inference_steps&#96;: 5 (from &#96;FlowMatching&#96; default)\\\\n\\\\n### Expert\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;hidden_size&#96;: 2048\\\\n- &#96;num_attention_heads&#96;: 16\\\\n- &#96;head_dim&#96;: 128\\\\n- &#96;intermediate_size&#96;: 8256\\\\n- &#96;expert_non_causal_attention&#96;: true\\\\n\\\\n### Local Python config\\\\n\\\\n&#96;/data/Zhengyang/alpamayo/src/alpamayo_r1/config.py&#96;:\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;AlpamayoR1Config&#96; extends &#96;ReasoningVLAConfig&#96;\\\\n- Adds: &#96;diffusion_cfg&#96;, &#96;action_space_cfg&#96;, &#96;action_in_proj_cfg&#96;, &#96;action_out_proj_cfg&#96;, &#96;expert_cfg&#96;, &#96;keep_same_dtype&#96;, &#96;expert_non_causal_attention&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Other config-like files\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;/data/Zhengyang/alpamayo/pyproject.toml&#96;: Python 3.12, torch 2.8, transformers 4.57.1, flash-attn 2.8.3, physical_ai_av, etc.\\\\n- &#96;/data/Zhengyang/alpamayo/.specstory/.project.json&#96;: Project metadata, not model config\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. File Purposes Summary\\\\n\\\\n| File | Purpose |\\\\n|------|---------|\\\\n| &#96;load_physical_aiavdataset.py&#96; | Load Physical AI AV data into model input format |\\\\n| &#96;helper.py&#96; | Chat message creation, processor setup, &#96;to_device&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;test_inference.py&#96; | CLI inference script, computes minADE |\\\\n| &#96;alpamayo_r1.py&#96; | Main model, inference loop, diffusion sampling |\\\\n| &#96;base_model.py&#96; | ReasoningVLA, configs, trajectory fusion mixin, tokenizers |\\\\n| &#96;action_in_proj.py&#96; | Fourier + MLP projection for action space |\\\\n| &#96;delta_tokenizer.py&#96; | History trajectory tokenization (delta encoding) |\\\\n| &#96;token_utils.py&#96; | CoC/meta_action extraction, stopping criteria, padding |\\\\n| &#96;flow_matching.py&#96; | Euler flow-matching diffusion sampler |\\\\n| &#96;action_space.py&#96; | Base ActionSpace interface |\\\\n| &#96;unicycle_accel_curvature.py&#96; | Unicycle kinematic model and traj↔action conversion |\\\\n| &#96;discrete_action_space.py&#96; | Discrete trajectory tokenizer wrapper (for training) |\\\\n| &#96;rotation.py&#96; | SO3, yaw, rotation matrix helpers |\\\\n| &#96;config.py&#96; | &#96;AlpamayoR1Config&#96; definition |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. README Overview\\\\n\\\\n- **Project**: Alpamayo 1 – reasoning and action prediction for autonomous driving.\\\\n- **Paper**: arXiv:2511.00088.\\\\n- **Model**: ~10B params, Cosmos-Reason VLM + action
